text: The sterile hum of this modern space, with its glass walls and precise signage, evokes a feeling of detachment but also curiosity. Here, the world is meticulously arranged for efficiency and clarity, yet my mind drifts toward the existential—who decided on these boundaries, and do they contain or liberate me? The R+D exhibit promises innovation and progress, but I wonder: does every advance deepen our understanding, or simply multiply our questions? I feel small, intrigued, and quietly restless within these deliberate confines.
